commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 jlist' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d||'[]');const p=j.find(x=>x.name==='mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge');console.log('status='+(p&&p.pm2_env&&p.pm2_env.status));console.log('uptime='+(p?Math.floor((Date.now()-p.pm2_env.pm_uptime)/1000):-1));});"

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out-0.log')
